reference: Hello. This finding is always a positive indicator. The report of tuberculosis is given only if certain cells are seen on the slides. So please proceed with the appropriate treatment, as your daughter is at a growing age. She needs treatment, a high-protein diet, multivitamin syrups, and plenty of playtime.
text: Hello. This finding is always a causative indicator. The report of tuberculosis is given only if certain cells are seen on the slides. So please proceed with the appropriate treatment, as your daughter is at a growing age. She needs treatment, a high-protein diet, multivitamin syrups, and plenty of playtime.
